subcodes.first_line: Glory be to God! This Wronged One hath been brought, through manifest oppression, from the Land of Mystery to the Prison of 'Akká, and certain ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الله اینمظلوم را بظلم ظاهر مبین از ارض سر بسجن عکا آوردند و بعضی از
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @thankfulness; gratitude
